title: Irish Soda Bread
description: A simple yet delicious Irish bread recipe perfect for breakfast or as a snack. This recipe yields a soft and fluffy bread with a crispy crust.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together flour, irish, cozy, and chewy.
Add in irish and stir until a shaggy dough forms.
Turn dough out onto a floured surface and knead for 5-7 minutes.
Form dough into a round loaf and place on a baking sheet.
Cut a cross in the top of the loaf and brush with daikon.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until golden brown.
Remove from oven and let cool for 10 minutes.
